bioId:
Generalist 3D Artist dengan pengalaman 3+ tahun, berspesialisasi dalam pembuatan lingkungan (environment), hard-surface modeling, dan texturing PBR untuk industri game serta pengalaman interaktif.

Memiliki rekam jejak terbukti dalam menghasilkan aset berkualitas tinggi yang teroptimasi dengan baik untuk berbagai proyek, termasuk simulasi VR, digitalisasi museum, dan gamifikasi.
bioEn:
Generalist 3D Artist with 3+ years of experience, specializing in environment creation, hard-surface modeling, and PBR texturing for the gaming industry and interactive experiences.

Proven track record in delivering high-quality, well-optimized assets for diverse projects, including VR simulations, museum digitalization, and gamification.
software: Blender 3D, Substance Painter, Unity Engine (Certified), Unreal Engine 5, Adobe Photoshop, ZBrush
expertise: Environment Design, Hard Surface Modeling, PBR Texturing Workflow, Real-Time Asset Optimization, Level Assembling, FDM 3D Printing
projects: Projection Blending Museum Mandiri, Virtual Training Sim, Nordson VR Training, Smart Elearning, Interactive Map S. Mandala, Keychron 3D Asset
certifications:
Unity Certified Associate: Artist | 2024 · Unity Technologies
SKKNI Desainer Multimedia Madya | 2024 · Nasional
SKKNI Junior 3D Game Artist | 2023 · Nasional

experience.title: Lead Environment Artist
experience.descId: Memimpin desain environment dan memastikan aset 3D siap pakai untuk skenario real-time. Mengoptimasi pipeline menggunakan Nanite/Lumen.
experience.descEn: Leading environment design and ensuring 3D assets are real-time ready. Optimizing pipelines using Nanite/Lumen.

experience.title: Training Facilitator (Unity Artist)
experience.descId: Mendampingi talenta muda melalui Discord & sesi online mingguan. Memberikan bimbingan teknis intensif mengenai UI/UX, tata cahaya, dan VFX.
experience.descEn: Mentored young talents via Discord & online sessions. Provided technical guidance on UI/UX, lighting, and VFX.

experience.title: Freelance 3D Artist
experience.descId: Mengerjakan komisi pembuatan aset 3D untuk berbagai studio game dan konferensi internasional IC2IE 2023.
experience.descEn: Executed 3D asset creation commissions for game studios and the IC2IE 2023 international conference.

education.descId: Lulus dengan IPK 3.8. Fokus pada Pemodelan 3D, Animasi, dan Pemrograman Game 2D.
education.descEn: Graduated with a 3.8 GPA. Focused on 3D Modeling, Animation, and 2D Game Programming.
